I1S_CEREBRAL_PALSY (I1S) Cerebral Palsy CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - neurological - cerebral palsy. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
315 I1T I1T_STROKE (I1T) Cerebrovascular Accident/Stroke CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - neurological - cerebrovascular accident/stroke. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
316 I1U I1U_DEMENTIA (I1U) Dementia Other than Alzheimers Disease CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - neurological - dementia other than Alzheimer's. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" =
